name: vinel
description: Vim / Neovim modal editing for VS Code — ViNEL Is Not an Emulation Layer. A native modal state machine (normal/visual/insert modes, operators, text objects, dot-repeat, find-char) routed straight to VS Code's own commands. Not a Vim emulation and not a Neovim bridge: no type-hijack, no shadow undo — fast on big files.

commands.title: ViNEL: Delete to end of line (D)
ViNEL: Change to end of line (C)
ViNEL: Open line below / swap selection ends (o)
ViNEL: Append at end of line (A)
ViNEL: Search word under cursor forward (*)
ViNEL: Search word under cursor backward (#)
ViNEL: (internal) run + record a built-in key while recording
ViNEL: (internal) run a VS Code command from a Vim key
ViNEL: Block insert at left edge (visual-block I)
ViNEL: Block append at right edge (visual-block A)
